creator: lev@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hmm, it works on 10-STABLE... Very strange.

Installing /usr/home/lev/FreeBSD/ports/devel/p5-subversion/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.16/man/man3/SVN::Client.3
Installing /usr/home/lev/FreeBSD/ports/devel/p5-subversion/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.16/man/man3/SVN::Fs.3
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
